title: Accenture India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Accenture India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Accenture India has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Pimpri-Chinchwad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Accenture India:
Accenture India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Accenture India!
